_comment: TRANSLATABLE English strings. Resolved per page via the eleventyComputed `t` lookup (English fallback). 1a only ships `en`; /zh/ lands in 1b. Values are verbatim from the live English output (entities like &/ /© kept literal, emitted with the `safe` filter) — keep byte-identical.

footer.venue: A globally coordinated benchmark for embodied bimanual manipulation  ·  Workshop date & venue TBD
footer.copy: © 2026 Workshop Organizers — Toward a Globally Coordinated Benchmark for Real-World Embodied Bimanual Manipulation.

index.title: EBiM Benchmark · Embodied Bimanual Manipulation
index.description: A globally coordinated benchmark for real-world embodied bimanual manipulation, with cross-continent real-robot validation on Mobile FR3 Duo platforms.
index.ogDescription: A globally coordinated benchmark for real-world embodied bimanual manipulation, with cross-continent real-robot validation on Mobile FR3 Duo platforms.
index.twitterDescription: A globally coordinated benchmark for real-world embodied bimanual manipulation, with cross-continent real-robot validation on Mobile FR3 Duo platforms.

competition.title: The EBiM Competition · Cross-Continent Robot Benchmark
competition.description: Compete for up to $5,250 per task (cash + purchase voucher): cable routing, deformable handling & assisted living on Mobile FR3 Duo across four testbeds.
competition.ogTitle: The EBiM Competition · Cross-Continent Robot Benchmark
competition.ogDescription: Open simulation benchmark plus real-robot validation on Mobile FR3 Duo platforms in Hamburg, Munich, Pittsburgh, and Shanghai. Cable, deformable, assisted living.
competition.twitterTitle: The EBiM Competition · Cross-Continent Robot Benchmark
competition.twitterDescription: Open simulation benchmark plus real-robot validation on Mobile FR3 Duo platforms in Hamburg, Munich, Pittsburgh, and Shanghai. Cable, deformable, assisted living.

workshop.title: EBiM Benchmark Workshop · Embodied Bimanual Manipulation
workshop.description: Half-day EBiM Benchmark workshop on embodied bimanual manipulation: 4 invited talks, an expert panel on benchmarking, a poster session, and awards.
workshop.ogTitle: EBiM Benchmark Workshop · Embodied Bimanual Manipulation
workshop.ogDescription: Half-day EBiM Benchmark workshop on embodied bimanual manipulation: 4 invited talks, an expert panel on benchmarking, a poster session, and awards.
workshop.twitterTitle: EBiM Benchmark Workshop · Embodied Bimanual Manipulation
workshop.twitterDescription: Half-day EBiM Benchmark workshop on embodied bimanual manipulation: 4 invited talks, an expert panel on benchmarking, a poster session, and awards.

contact.title: Contact · EBiM Benchmark
contact.description: Have a question about the EBiM Benchmark competition, workshop, partnership, or platform? Send a categorized message and we'll route it to the right team.
contact.ogDescription: Send the EBiM Benchmark team a categorized message — competition, workshop, partnership, media, technical, or testbed-hosting inquiries.
contact.twitterDescription: Send the EBiM Benchmark team a categorized message — competition, workshop, partnership, media, technical, or testbed-hosting inquiries.

jsonld.eventNameIndex: EBiM Benchmark: Toward a Globally Coordinated Benchmark for Real-World Embodied Bimanual Manipulation
jsonld.eventDescriptionIndex: A globally coordinated benchmarking initiative for real-world embodied bimanual manipulation, featuring cross-continent real-robot validation and a community workshop.
jsonld.eventNameCompetition: EBiM Competition: Cross-Continent Bimanual Manipulation Benchmark
jsonld.eventDescriptionCompetition: Open simulation benchmark followed by real-robot validation on Mobile FR3 Duo platforms in Hamburg, Munich, Pittsburgh, and Shanghai. Tasks include cable routing, deformable thermal-pad placement, and assisted living and feeding.
jsonld.eventNameWorkshop: EBiM Benchmark Workshop on Embodied Bimanual Manipulation
jsonld.eventDescriptionWorkshop: Invited talks, panel discussion, poster session, and competition awards. Date and venue to be announced.
jsonld.panelName: Panel: Benchmarking Standards for Embodied Robots
jsonld.contactPageDescription: Contact form for the EBiM Benchmark initiative on embodied bimanual manipulation.
